mapper.sql: file_id, submission_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, upload_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_submission_file(submission_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, upload_time, del_flag) values (#{submissionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_submission_file
submission_id,
file_name,
file_url,
file_size,
upload_time,
del_flag,
#{submissionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

mapper.update:
update biz_submission_file
submission_id = #{submissionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
file_name = #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_size = #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT},
upload_time = #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_submission_file set submission_id = #{submissionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, file_name = #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_size = #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT}, upload_time = #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where file_id = #{fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
